features: Love Hearts Fragrance: Carex Fun Edition Love Hearts Shower Gel features a delightful Love Hearts fragrance that leaves your skin smelling sweet and refreshed.
Gentle Cleansing: Effectively cleanses your skin without stripping away its natural moisture, leaving it soft, smooth, and pleasantly hydrated.
Suitable for All Skin Types: Dermatologically tested and 100% soap-free formula makes it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
Fun Edition: Add a touch of fun to your shower routine with this vibrant and playful Love Hearts shower gel that makes washing more enjoyable.
Revitalizing Formula: Gently revitalizes your skin, leaving it feeling rejuvenated and refreshed after every shower.
description: Product Description Carex Love Hearts Shower Gel, Effectively Cleans and Protects Your Skin, Bulk Buy, 100% Soap Free, 500ml (Pack of 6) Indulge in a delightful shower experience with Carex Love Hearts Shower Gel. Specially formulated to cleanse and protect your skin, this shower gel leaves your skin feeling soft, hydrated, and pleasantly scented. Gentle Cleansing: Effectively cleanses your skin without stripping away its natural moisture. Skin Protection: Formulated to protect and nourish your skin, leaving it feeling refreshed and revitalized. Sweet Scent: Infused with a sweet Love Hearts fragrance, this shower gel leaves a lingering, delightful scent on your skin. Suitable for All Skin Types: Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Soap-Free Formula: 100% soap-free formula ensures a gentle yet effective cleansing experience. Hydrating Formula: Hydrates and moisturizes your skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and moisturized after every wash. Maintains Natural pH: Helps maintain the skin's natural pH level, promoting healthy and balanced skin. Family-Friendly: Carex is dedicated to providing care and protection for the entire family, ensuring everyone can enjoy life to the fullest. Make your daily shower routine more enjoyable with Carex Love Hearts Shower Gel. With its nourishing formula and delightful fragrance, it's the perfect way to start or end your day with a refreshing cleanse. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidapropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Polyquaterium-7, Parfum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool, CI 17200, CI 14700 Directions For more information, please see the packaging. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Avoid contact with natural stone surfaces and stainless steel. May cause staining. See more
